highlights.text: Serial code CH-013 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-CH-013-HON
State / Country: Chandigarh / India | Category: Honeymoon / Couple Escape
Ideal for: Couples, Honeymooners & Seekers of Luxury
Complimentary private Sunset Shikara Boat Cruise on Sukhna Lake
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private sunset lake cruise combined with premium couples wellness rituals
Shopping: Phulkari embroidery, Sector 17 & Elante Retail, gourmet sweet delicacies

itinerary.title: Romantic City Escape & Luxury Spa
itinerary.tagline: Sukhna Lake • Rock Garden • Zakir Hussain Rose Garden • Elante
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to India's most beautifully planned urban paradise. This highly tailored Chandigarh Honeymoon Package, meticulously designed by the romantic travel experts at TRAGUIN, promises a seamless escape filled with beautiful moments, premium stays, and deeply relaxing experiences.

Travel Format: Private Honeymoon FIT Itinerary with On-Call Concierge Management. Vehicle: Premium luxury sedan. Meal Plan: Modified American Plan (Breakfast & Romantic Curated Dinners Included). TRAGUIN Curated Touch: Welcome chocolate platter, customized room decor setup upon arrival, reserved premium seats for evening experiences.
itinerary.seo_title: CH-013 | Romantic City Escape & Luxury Spa | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Honeymoon 02 Nights / 03 Days package (CH-013 / TG-CH-013-HON): private sunset shikara cruise, Rock Garden, Rose Garden, 90-minute couples spa, and luxury hotel options.

highlights.text: Private Sunset Shikara Cruise on Sukhna Lake
Nek Chand Rock Garden Artistic Tour
Candlelight Dinner at Award-Winning Rooftop Restaurant

days.title: Arrival in Chandigarh & Private Sunset Shikara Cruise
days.description: Your magical journey begins with a smooth arrival at Chandigarh Airport or Chandigarh Railway Station. A polished TRAGUIN hospitality representative along with a professional uniform-clad chauffeur will receive you with a beautiful fresh flower bouquet. Check in to your beautifully decorated honeymoon room. In the late afternoon, experience a private, curated sunset cruise on the calm waters of Sukhna Lake. Conclude your day with an intimate candlelight dinner specially reserved for you at an award-winning rooftop restaurant.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sukhna Lake Promenade & Waterfront Trail
Evening Experience: Private Sunset Shikara Ride with Refreshments
Overnight Stay: Chandigarh Luxury Hotel / Resort
Meals Included: Specially Arranged Candlelight Dinner

days.title: The Artistic Rock Garden, Rose Garden & Luxury Couples Spa
days.description: Awake to a lavish gourmet floating breakfast inside your luxury suite or resort pool. Mid-morning, step out for a curated day of Chandigarh Sightseeing at Nek Chand's legendary Rock Garden and the Zakir Hussain Rose Garden. The afternoon shifts into an oasis of pure relaxation with an exclusive 90-minute signature couples' aromatherapy massage followed by a steam, sauna, and hot herbal tea session.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Rock Garden, Rose Garden, Sector 17 Plaza Walk
Exclusive Highlight: Premium 90-Minute Couples Luxury Spa Ritual
Overnight Stay: Chandigarh Premium Luxury Stay
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast & Fine Dining Dinner

days.title: Premium Cafe Trails, Elante Retail Excursion & Departure
days.description: Savor a peaceful breakfast before compiling your bags. Spend the morning checking out the ultra-modern side of the city with a visit to the high-end Elante Mall or the elite designer boutiques of Sector 9. Your private vehicle will then carry you smoothly back to the airport or railway station for your onward flight.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Elite Sector Shopping Squares & Cafes
Optional Activities: Premium Lunch at a boutique microbrewery/bistro

hotels.name: The Oberoi Sukhvilas Spa Resort
hotels.description: Option 04 — Ultra Luxury tier handpicked property.
hotels.room_type: Premier Room / Luxury Tent with Private Pool

inclusions.text: 02 Nights luxury accommodation in handpicked, pre-vetted top luxury hotels
Daily gourmet buffet breakfasts at the hotel dining hall
Dedicated private premium sedan for all transfers & sightseeing as per itinerary
Complimentary private Sunset Shikara Boat Cruise on Sukhna Lake
Premium 90-minute Couples Luxury Spa treatment included once during stay
Special Honeymoon Amenities: Room decoration, fresh cake, and chocolate platter
24/7 dedicated on-ground TRAGUIN customer support & assistance
All applicable luxury hotel taxes, driver allowances, parking, and toll fees
Airfare, train tickets, or interstate transit expenses
Entrance tickets at monuments and camera fees
Lunch meals, laundry, alcoholic beverages, and minibar expenses
Optional activities or personal shopping items
